author: codex-duplicate-audit

patch.value: Extract shared extension fixture writer for tests

Duplicate audit 2026-05-22: extension/package tests repeat fixture creation for manifest.json plus trivial index.js/index.mjs entrypoints. Representative copies include tests/integration/help-runtime.spec.ts:6 createProjectExtension, tests/unit/sdk-index.spec.ts:31 createProjectExtension, tests/unit/contracts-command.spec.ts:18 createProjectExtension, tests/unit/extension-loader.spec.ts:26 createExtension, tests/unit/extension-command-github.spec.ts:19 writeMockExtension, tests/unit/package-manifest.spec.ts:15 createExtension, and many inline manifest/index writes in tests/unit/extension-command.spec.ts. Existing pm-eltf covers item factories, not extension fixture setup.

A shared writeTestExtension/createTestExtension helper supports project/global/source roots, entry filename, capabilities, and custom entry source; repeated local extension fixture writers are removed where they do not clarify test intent; extension/package tests and pnpm build pass.

value.author: codex-duplicate-audit
value.text: Duplicate-check evidence: pm search 'writeTestExtension createProjectExtension extension fixture manifest test helper' and broad helper search found no active exact item; pm-eltf is scoped to createTask/createSeedItem item factories.

message: Create duplicate-audit finding for extension test fixtures
